description: CmR is the 219-aa type I chloramphenicol acetyltransferase (CAT) from E. coli transposon Tn9, conferring chloramphenicol resistance by O-acetylating the antibiotic.

label: CmR
note: CmR is the 219-aa type I chloramphenicol acetyltransferase (CAT) from E. coli transposon Tn9, conferring chloramphenicol resistance by O-acetylating the antibiotic.

label: Oxyanion-hole stabilizing Ser146
note: Ser146 (= Ser148 in CATIII numbering) stabilizes the oxyanion of the tetrahedral transition state via a hydrogen bond.

label: His-positioning acidic residue Asp197
note: Asp197 (= Asp199 in CATIII) stabilizes the position/tautomer of catalytic His193, part of the arrangement that polarizes the imidazole and modifies its pKa (...
